creator: mkamenjak77@gmail.com
text:
Hello 

I would like to report you that there exists a collision between the
IPFS package in FreeBSD and the new IPFS protocol.

https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=ipfs&sektion=8

https://dist.ipfs.io/

https://ipfs.io/

That is when I install the ipfs implementation of the protocol on BSD,
the shell doesn't know which one to use.

I hope this gets resolved soon.

Thank you!
